title: LedgerEntry
description: Derived, append-only ledger line posted from a source event (e.g. an issue_event). White paper §9.1 Step 4, §15. BALANCE = SUM(amount) — it is NEVER stored as a writable column.

source_event_id.description: The event that produced this line (issue_event id, payment id later, etc.). Enforces traceability.

amount.description: Signed CFA minor units. Debit positive (charge), credit negative (return/payment). Sum across a student = current balance.
